login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use your Mezan credentials to continue.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: We'll email you a reset link if the address exists.
forgot.sent_body: If an account exists for that email, reset instructions are on their way.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
reset.too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
reset.invalid_token: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

onboarding.title: Complete your registration
onboarding.subtitle: Enter your details to finish creating the account.
onboarding.success_body: You can now return to the cashier.
onboarding.invalid_token: This onboarding token is invalid or has been used.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.subtitle: Update your details, photo, interface language, and password when needed.
profile.page_subtitle: Manage your account information and security.
profile.photo_hint: JPEG, PNG, or WebP — max 2 MB.
profile.avatar_url_invalid: Enter a valid URL (for example https://…)
profile.phone_invalid_ly: Enter a valid Libyan phone number: 09, then a digit from 1 to 5, then 7 digits (10 digits in total).
profile.password_hint: Fill the fields below only if you want to change your password.
profile.current_password_required: Enter your current password to change it.
profile.new_password_too_short: New password must be at least 8 characters.
profile.password_enter_new: Enter a new password to continue.
profile.two_factor_hint: When enabled, a verification code is emailed on each sign-in.
profile.two_factor_password_required: Enter your current password to change 2FA settings.
profile.two_factor_confirm_hint: Enter your current password to enable two-factor authentication.

branch.title: Select a branch
branch.stub_body: Full branch picker lands with W-5 — this is a placeholder.

dashboard.no_branch: No branch is linked to your account.
dashboard.no_access: No permissions are enabled on your account yet.

errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts — please try again shortly.
errors.generic: We couldn't complete your request. Please try again.
errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.forbidden_body: You don't have the permission required to open this page.
errors.not_found_body: We couldn't locate the page you're looking for.
errors.offline_body: The server appears to be unreachable. Check your connection and retry.
errors.route_failed_body: Something went wrong while loading this page. Please retry.

required_password.title: Change your password
required_password.subtitle: You must choose a new password before continuing.
required_password.too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.

two_factor.title: Two-step verification
two_factor.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email.
two_factor.missing_challenge: Verification session expired. Please sign in again.

stub.body: This page ships with {{epic}}. The shell is in place; content is on the way.
